title: Melon Madness
description:
Based on the popular watermelon game, welcome: Melon Madness!



Combine fruit together to score points, strategize to maximize your space, and don't let any fruit out of the box. The more fruit you combine the more points you rack up. Take over the leaderboards and challenge your friends!



Have an extra controller?

Using two controllers, you can play with your friends in local COOP, 1v1 your friends to see who is really the master!



Play in different game-modes to spice up the fun!



Classic: For what you've come to expect

Reverse: An interesting twist where you have to drop the big fruit first

Bomb Attack: You have to deal with exploding fruit if you don't combine them fast enough

Double: Challenge yourself by playing two boards at once
description_short: A relaxing and engaging fruit merge game! Combine fruit without spilling any out of the box, and try to get the highest score! Play alone or with a friend, in coop mode.
